channel.title: AI Brain Fatigue on Charlotte's AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in AI Brain Fatigue on Charlotte's AI Lab

item.title: You Use AI Every Day. Your Brain Is Quietly Shrinking.
item.description: Harvard Business Review and BCG just dropped a study: 14% of AI users are experiencing ‘Brain Fry.’ Major errors up 39%, decision fatigue up 33%. Your daily AI habit might be hollowing out your brain.
